name: MGM Resorts International
summary: MGM Resorts International is a global gaming and entertainment company operating 16 domestic casino properties and two casino resorts in Macau through MGM China (56% interest). The company offers casino gaming, hotels, food and beverage, entertainment, meetings/conferences, and retail. It also operates online gaming through LeoVegas (international) and holds a 50% interest in BetMGM for U.S. online sports betting and iGaming.

products.name: Las Vegas Strip Resorts
products.description: Casino resort operations including Aria, Bellagio, The Cosmopolitan, MGM Grand Las Vegas, Mandalay Bay, Luxor, New York-New York, Excalibur, and Park MGM.

products.name: Regional Operations
products.description: Casino properties in Michigan, Mississippi, New Jersey, Maryland, Massachusetts, New York, and Ohio.

products.name: MGM China
products.description: Two casino resorts in Macau — MGM Macau and MGM Cotai — operated under a gaming concession held by MGM Grand Paradise.

products.name: LeoVegas
products.description: Online gaming platform offering iGaming, digital slots, table games, live dealer, and online sports betting, primarily in Europe and Brazil.

products.name: BetMGM
products.description: U.S. online sports betting and iGaming platform operated through a 50% owned unconsolidated venture, BetMGM North America Venture.

partnerships.description: MGM holds approximately 56% controlling interest; operates MGM Macau and MGM Cotai casino resorts in Macau.
50% ownership interest in unconsolidated affiliate for U.S. online sports betting and iGaming operations.
50% ownership interest in unconsolidated affiliate developing an integrated resort in Osaka, Japan.
